arts.ttl: How Hull City's final 10 fixtures compare to relegation rivals Derby County, Stoke City and Luton
arts.sum: Luton Town and Plymouth Argyle both suffered heavy defeats, but there was a first win in 2025 for Derby County against John Eustace's former club, Derby County, while Portsmouth moved 10 points clear of danger on Sunday with a fine win over leaders Leeds United. City's point at Ashton Gate kept the Tigers five points clear of danger ahead of their big home meeting with Oxford United on Tuesday night, but the manner of their resolute, battling display will give them more confidence going into the final 10 games of the season.

arts.ttl: Hull City dressing room view on ending MKM Stadium hoodoo speaks volumes
arts.sum: After the 2-0 win, everybody's looking forward to the next home game," McLoughlin told Hull Live, whilst also highlighting the positive impact the MKM Stadium's playing surface had made. We're going into those games confident that we can get the results, and it's almost like a weight has been lifted by beating Plymouth, so hopefully, we can follow that up.
